title: clausena timoriensis
intro: Clausena timoriensis, also known as the Indonesian blood lime, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, inflammation, and digestive issues due to its rich content of flavonoids and limonoids. The health benefits of Clausena timoriensis include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to reduce the risk of chronic diseases such as cancer and cardiovascular disease. Clausena timoriensis is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion, and it is also used in some herbal preparations, such as tinctures and essential oils.
